info.name: Paystack Transfers API
info.description:
Send money from your Paystack balance to bank accounts and mobile money wallets across supported African countries. Includes transfer recipients, single and bulk transfers, OTP management, and bulk charges.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paystack Support
 Email: support@paystack.com

urlencoded.description:
(Required) A list of transfer recipient object. Each object should contain type, name, and bank_code. 
Any Create Transfer Recipient param can also be passed.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Recipient Type (Only nuban at this time)
(Required) Recipient's name
(Required) Recipient's bank account number
(Required) Recipient's bank code. You can get the list of Bank Codes by calling the List Banks endpoint
A description for this recipient
Currency for the account receiving the transfer
An authorization code from a previous transaction
Stringified JSON object of custom data

urlencoded.description: (Required) Where should we transfer from? Only balance is allowed for now
(Required) Amount to transfer in kobo if currency is NGN and pesewas if currency is GHS.
(Required) The transfer recipient's code
The reason or narration for the transfer.
Specify the currency of the transfer. Defaults to NGN.

If specified, the field should be a unique identifier (in lowercase) for the object. 
Only -,_ and alphanumeric characters are allowed.
